content: Hey, I'm looking to learn some new skills. I've been streaming video games for a while now and I'm feeling like I need to mix things up.
That's totally understandable! Streaming can be a lot of fun, but it's great that you're looking to challenge yourself and try new things. What kind of skills are you thinking of learning?
I'm not sure yet, but I've been thinking about trying my hand at gardening. I've always loved plants and I think it would be a great way to relax and get outside.
Gardening is a great hobby! You could try starting with some easy-to-grow plants like tomatoes or herbs, and then move on to more challenging things like mushrooms or succulents.
Yeah, that sounds like a great idea. I've also been thinking about getting back into speedcubing, which I used to do when I was younger.
Speedcubing is a great way to challenge your brain and improve your problem-solving skills! You could try finding some online resources or joining a local speedcubing group to get started again.
Yeah, that's a great idea. I've also been thinking about training for a triathlon, which I've always wanted to do.
That's a great goal! Triathlons are a fantastic way to challenge yourself physically and mentally. Have you started training yet?
Not yet, but I'm planning to start soon. I've been busy with my streaming schedule and taking care of my kids, but I'm hoping to get back into training soon.
That's great! It's wonderful that you're prioritizing your family and your streaming career. Have you thought about how you'll balance your training with your other responsibilities?

Yeah, it'll be a challenge, but I'm hoping to get my kids involved in my training and make it a fun family activity. We live in Minneapolis, so there are plenty of great places to train and get outside.
That's a great idea! Getting your kids involved can be a wonderful way to spend quality time together and create lasting memories. What kind of triathlon are you thinking of training for?
I'm not sure yet, but I'm thinking about doing a sprint triathlon to start. I've heard it's a great way to get started and build up my endurance.
That's a great idea! Sprint triathlons are a fantastic way to get started and build up your confidence. Have you thought about working with a coach or joining a training group to help you prepare?
Yeah, that's a great idea. I'll have to look into it. Thanks for the suggestions!
No problem, happy to help! It was great chatting with you, Hayden.
Yeah, same to you! I'll talk to you later.
